title: gonystylus micranthus
intro: Gonystylus micranthus is a species of plant in the family Gonystylaceae, native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gonystylus micranthus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds and infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
